data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Deterministic conversion mapping to order/fulfillment entities', but the evidence does not provide any specific details or endpoints that confirm this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for deterministic conversion mapping, yet there is no evidence of how the mapping is implemented or validated in the provided steps. This indicates a clear gap in the validation of the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of deterministic conversion mapping to order/fulfillment entities.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
